info.english_meaning: to do penance to be fatigued to be tired
info.hindI_arTa: tapaScaryA karanA vrata karanA TakanA duHKita honA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prasIda viSrAmyatu vIra vajram' (ki0 39) viDAmyatu vigataSramamastu viramatu
'iha devatAtvaM prati bahu viSrAmyati BedaH' (vAraruca0 praTame kalpe) viSrAmyati tizWati
'jAnAmi tvAM pariSrAntaM tato viSrAmakANkziRam' (BA0 vana0 18897) viSrAmaH SramABAvaH SramaH KedaH (SArIraH)
'kAma karRAntaviSrAnte viSAle tasya locane' (raGu0 413) karRAvaDi vistAramApya sTite ityAha
'raGuriva sa narendro yajYaviSrAntakoSaH' (Si0 BA0) viSrAntaH parisamAptaH
'muKaM tava viSrAntakaTaM dunoti mAm' (raGu0 855) viSrAntakaTaM viratavacanaM nivfttasaMlApam
'pitAmahaH prajAsarge tvayi viSrAntavAnpraBuH' (BA0 SAM0 1567) viSrAntavAn SramavinodaM kftavAn
'SrAmyantImanayad gehaM viSrAmyantIM tarO tarO' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 4115) viSrAmyantIM SramApanodaM kurvatIm
'yastrayodaSa varzARi gadayA kftaniSramaH' (BA0 Salya0 5819) niSramo vyAyAmaH
'pariSrAnte vidIrRe vA' (BA0 SrO0 153) pariSrAntaH klAntaH KinnaH
